description: Open the 4-band Landsat image at ~/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif (Band 1: SWIR1, Band 2: NIR, Band 3: Red, Band 4: Green). Derive the following virtual bands: 'NDVI' using (band_2 - band_3) / (band_2 + band_3), 'NDBI' using (band_1 - band_2) / (band_1 + band_2), 'BUI' using NDBI - NDVI, and 'urban_footprint' as a binary mask where BUI > 0 is 1 and others are 0. Save the enriched product containing all original and derived bands to ~/snap_projects/urban_analysis.dim. Export the urban_footprint mask as a GeoTIFF to ~/snap_exports/urban_footprint.tif and the BUI statistics to ~/snap_exports/bui_statistics.txt.
